metadata.title: Acme TrustHub Product Blog
metadata.description: A product update mentioning compliance workflows and customer onboarding improvements.

evidence.text: Acme TrustHub added onboarding checklists for procurement teams and a dashboard for vendor documentation requests. The update mentions compliance workflows, customer questionnaires, and report exports, but it does not provide SOC 2 audit evidence.
